entry.note: <L>4782<pc>24,1<k1>an<k2>an<h>2<e>1 <hom>2.</hom> <s>an</s> ¦ <ab>cl.</ab> 2. <ab>P.</ab> <s>a/niti</s> or <s>a/nati</s>, <s>Ana</s>, <s>anizyati</s>, <s>A/nIt</s> [<ls>RV. x, 129, 2</ls>], to breathe, respire, gasp; <div n="to"/>to live, <ls>L.</ls>; <div n="to"/>to move, go, <ls>L.</ls> [<ab>cf.</ab> <lang>Gk.</lang> <gk>ἄνεμος</gk> <lang>Lat.</lang> <etym>animus</etym>] : <div n="vp"/><ab>Caus.</ab> <s>Anayati</s>: <div n="vp"/><ab>Desid.</ab> <s>aninizati</s>.<info whitneyroots="an,3"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="2P"/> <LEND>

<L>2199<pc>1-0164<k1>an<k2>an<h>2 2. {#an#}¦, {#a/niti#} <ls>P. 7,2,76.</ls> {#a/nati#} (der Ton ruht in den Specialformen bald auf der 1sten, bald auf der 2ten Silbe) <ls>AV. 4,4,3.</ls> {#a/nyate#} <ls>DHĀTUP. 26,66.</ls> imperf. {#AnIt#} od. {#Anat#} <ls>P. 7,3,98.</ls> <ls n="P. 7,3,">99.</ls> {#Ana, anitA, anizyati, AnIt#} . <div n="1"> 1) {%athmen%} <ls>DHĀTUP. 24,62.</ls> <ls n="DHĀTUP.">26,66.</ls> {#AnI^davA	aM sva\DayA\ tadeka^m#} <ls>ṚV. 10,129,1.</ls> [Page1-0165] {#ko hyevAnyAtkaH prARyAt . yadeza AkASa Anando na syAt#} <ls>TAITT. UP. 2,7.</ls> <div n="1">— 2) {%nach Luft schnappen, lechzen%}: {#yaTA^ sma te vioha^to a\Bita^ptami\vAna^ti#} <ls>AV. 4,4,3.</ls> {#a
anneva prA\RanpaidIrRaH SiSye#} <ls>ŚAT. BR. 2,5,3,3.</ls> {#paidIrRA a
atyaSca prA\RatyaSca SiSyiryare#} <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 2,5,">2,2.</ls> <div n="1">— 3) {%gehen%} <ls>NAIGH. 2,14.</ls> — Caus. {#Anayati#} . — Desid. {#aninizati#} <ls>P. 6,1,3</ls>, <ls>Sch. 8,4,21</ls>, <ls>Sch.</ls> <div n="p">— {#apa#} {%ausathmen%}: {#a
taSca^rati roca
Asya prA\RAda^pAna	I#} <ls>ṚV. 10,189,2.</ls> {#apA^nati\ prARa^ti\ puru^zo\ garBe^ antaA#} <ls>AV. 11,6,14.</ls> <ls n="AV. 11,6,">7.</ls> {#yo 'pAnenApAniti sa ta AtmA sarvAntaraH#} <ls>ŚAT. BR. 14,6,5,1.</ls> = <ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 3,4,1.</ls> {#yadvE prARiti sa prARo yadapAniti so 'pAnaH . — . tasmAdaprARannanapAnanvAcamaBivyAharati#} <ls>CHĀND. UP. 1,3,3.</ls> {#tasmAdekameva vrataM caretprARyAccEvApAnyAcca#} <ls>ŚAT. BR. 14,4,3,34.</ls> (= <ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 1,5,23.</ls>) {#muKena muKaM saMDAyABiprARyApAnyAt#} <ls ... [truncated]

<L>3171<pc>1-037-c<k1>an<k2>an<h>2 <hom>2.</hom> √{#an#}¦, {#a/nati#} und {#a/niti#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%athmen%} <ls n="Chr.">19,17</ls>. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%nach Luft schnappen, lechzen%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 *{%gehen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#apa#} {%ausathmen, aushauchen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aByapa#} {%anathmen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#ava#} {%einathmen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#vyava#} {%dazwischen athmen%} <ls>MAITR. S. 4,7,7</ls>. <ls>TĀṆḌYA-BR. 7,1,9</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#udA#} ({#udAniti#} fehlerhaft für {#udaniti#}). <div n="p">— Mit {#ud#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%hinaufathmen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%ausathmen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aByud#} {%anathmen, anhauchen%}. <div n="p">— Mit *{#parA#} und *{#pari#}. <div n="p">— Mit {#pra#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%einathmen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%athmen%} <ls n="Chr.">32,2</ls>. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%leben%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%wehen%}. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {%athmen machen, beleben%}. — {#prARita#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%am Leben erhalten%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%beseelt, von Verlangen erfüllt Etwas zu thun%} (<ab>Inf.</ab>). <div n="p">— Mit {#anupra#} {%nachathmen, hinterher athmen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aBipra#} {%einathmen; beeinathmen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#vi#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%athmen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%den Athem durch den Körper durchathmen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aBivi#} {%behauchen, durchathmen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#sam#} {%athmen, leben%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#anusam#} {%darnach athmen%} <ls>AIT. BR. 4,30</ls>. <LEND>
